description: Letter from Yefet b. Menashshe Ibn al-Qaṭāʾif, in Alexandria, to one of his brothers (Ḥalfon or Peraḥya), in Fustat. Fragment (left side of recto). Dating: first half of the 12th century. The letter describes the general mourning of the community in Alexandria after somebody's death. Mentions a cantor from the Ibn al-Jāzfīnī/Ghāzfīnī family; Abū l-Khayr; and a young woman. (Information from Frenkel.)
description_he: קטע מכתב מיפת בן מנשה, מאלכסנדריה, לאחיו, על אבל בקהילה ובני משפחה ידועים, תחילת המאה ה-12
